name: McAfee, Inc.
description: McAfee Corp. is a prominent American global computer security software company headquartered in San Jose, California. Originally founded in 1987, the company specializes in providing comprehensive online protection solutions for consumers and businesses. Their product portfolio includes advanced antivirus, identity theft protection, privacy tools, and scam prevention software. By leveraging AI-powered technology, McAfee aims to make digital life safer for users worldwide, ensuring that individuals and families can navigate the internet with confidence, privacy, and security across their various devices and online accounts.
